oracle_data.description: The list of oracle data broadcast to a given spec

GetOracleDataBySpecIDResponse.title: Get Oracle Data By Spec ID Response
GetOracleDataBySpecIDResponse.description: The response for a list of all oracle data broadcast to a given spec

pub_keys.description: pubKeys is the list of authorized public keys that signed the data for this source. All the public keys in the data should be contained in these public keys.

data.description: data holds all the properties of the data

matched_spec_ids.description: matched_specs_ids lists all the specs that matched this data. When the array is empty, it means no spec matched this data.

broadcast_at.description: broadcast_at is the time at which the data was broadcast to the markets with a matching spec. It has no value when the date did not match any spec. The value is a Unix timestamp in nanoseconds.

data.v1.ExternalData.title: External Data
data.v1.ExternalData.description: ExternalData describes valid external source data that has been received by the node. It represents both matched and unmatched data.

name.description: name is the name of the property.

value.description: value is the value of the property.

data.v1.Property.title: Property
data.v1.Property.description: Property describes one property of an oracle spec with a key with its value.
